title: Si Juki the Movie: Harta Pulau Monyet
original_title: Si Juki the Movie: Harta Pulau Monyet
overview: After discovering a map from their ancestors, Juki and his family set out on a daring treasure hunt, where pirates, monkeys and a dreadful curse await.
